config.name: MyLÚA Mom Demo — 14 Scene Observational Explainer
config.audience_description: Pregnant and postpartum moms who want calm, trustworthy support between visits. Some may not have a doula. The demo should feel reassuring, practical, and easy to use—showing that LÚA helps with education, check-ins, symptoms, local resources, language switching, reminders, and gentle nudges without hype.

persona.name: Conversational Product Minimal
persona.description: Clear, friendly, no hype. UI-forward clarity with calm restraint. Subtle motion, neutral lighting, minimal distractions.
persona.lighting_style: Soft neutral daylight or warm lamp practicals; no dramatic contrast
persona.rhythm: Alternates UI clarity with small human moments; avoids long runs of heavy motion
persona.framing_rules: Centered phone mockups; shallow depth-of-field backgrounds; simple compositions
persona.color_behavior: Warm neutrals, soft beige/sage accents; no neon, no heavy saturation

characters.nano_prompt: A realistic documentary-style woman in her late 20s to early 30s, medium skin tone, natural hair, simple comfortable home clothing in neutral tones, calm expression, no glam makeup, modest NYC apartment environment, natural textures, unposed, mobile-first vertical framing.
characters.anchor_description: Keep the same woman consistent across lifestyle scenes: late 20s–early 30s, medium skin tone, natural hair, neutral comfortable clothing, understated presence, documentary realism, no glam styling, modest NYC interior.

scenes.title: Emotional Entry (Evening)
scenes.purpose: Ground the demo in a real moment where questions show up between visits.
scenes.nano_prompt: A realistic, documentary-style vertical image (9:16) of a pregnant woman sitting on a couch in a modest apartment at night. Warm table lamp lighting from the side, soft shadows, darkened background. She holds a smartphone loosely in one hand and looks thoughtful but calm. No posing, no performance. Natural textures, subtle grain, intimate realism composed for mobile viewing.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Minimal motion only. The woman makes a subtle posture shift and a small hand adjustment on the phone. Phone screen emits a soft glow. Warm lamplight from the left side. Darkened background with gentle falloff. No camera movement. Quiet, calm atmosphere.
scenes.vo_line_1: Most questions don't wait for an appointment.
scenes.vo_line_2: They show up at night, when you're just trying to feel okay.
scenes.audio_direction: Warm, minimal ambient bed; soft room tone.

scenes.title: Home Screen (Calm Start)
scenes.purpose: Introduce the app as simple, calm, and easy to begin.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered in frame, displaying a maternal health app home screen. Background is a softly blurred neutral beige interior with diffused daylight. Clean, minimal aesthetic. Soft shadows beneath device. No dramatic lighting. Premium SaaS presentation.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Phone remains centered and steady. Very subtle 3% slow push-in toward screen over duration. No rotation. No lighting change. Calm, restrained motion.
scenes.vo_line_1: LÚA is a calm place to start.
scenes.vo_line_2: Support, right on your phone—whenever you need it.
scenes.audio_direction: Clean, soft tone; no bright UI SFX.

scenes.title: Ask Anything (Night Question)
scenes.purpose: Show 24/7 education via chat in a real-life moment.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup against a softly blurred nighttime interior background with cool blue undertones. Minimal depth of field. Device centered and upright. Calm, focused mood.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Typing animation appears naturally in input field: "I'm feeling anxious at night. Is this normal?" Text appears at realistic human speed. The response appears line-by-line with gentle opacity fades. Background remains cool-toned and dim. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: Ask what's on your mind—any time.
scenes.vo_line_2: LÚA answers with clear, supportive guidance.
scenes.audio_direction: Very subtle tap/typing SFX; keep quiet.

scenes.title: Conversational Follow-Up (Reassurance)
scenes.purpose: Make the experience feel human: LÚA responds to emotion, not just symptoms.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred interior with warm neutral lighting. Subtle warm beige background, clean and calm. The screen shows a maternal health chat conversation with a supportive tone.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. A second message appears: "It feels worse when I'm alone." LÚA response fades in gradually: "That makes sense. Want a short grounding exercise, or to talk it through?" Keep motion minimal and readable. No camera movement. No lighting shift.
scenes.vo_line_2: It's support that responds to how you feel.
scenes.audio_direction: Soft, reassuring bed; no dramatic swells.

scenes.title: Health Check-In (Morning)
scenes.purpose: Show quick check-ins that build continuity over time.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred bright interior with natural morning daylight from the right side. Neutral white and soft beige tones.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User taps a check-in option. Button depress animation is subtle and quick. Transition to next screen via gentle crossfade. No additional motion.
scenes.vo_line_1: A few quick check-ins keep you on track.
scenes.vo_line_2: So small changes don't get missed.

scenes.title: Symptom Log (Simple Entry)
scenes.purpose: Capture symptoms in-the-moment without making it feel clinical or heavy.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered in frame against a softly blurred minimal interior background in neutral tones. Clean and focused aesthetic. The screen shows a simple symptom log entry UI.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User selects a symptom entry and taps save. A small checkmark appears with a subtle opacity fade. No bounce, no celebration. Still background. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_2: LÚA helps you notice what's changing.
scenes.audio_direction: Single soft tap; no other SFX.

scenes.title: Insights (Clear Patterns)
scenes.purpose: Show trends surfaced gently—clarity without overwhelm.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred bright interior with diffused daylight and subtle greenery in background. Clear, calm, spacious feeling. The screen shows an insights or trends section.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Very subtle slow push-in toward an emotional trend or pattern section. No graph animations. No pulsing effects. Still and steady.
scenes.vo_line_2: So you can feel more prepared day to day.

scenes.title: Activity Feed (Open Prenatal Yoga)
scenes.purpose: Show personalized, small-step activities that feel doable—like opening a helpful video.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered in frame showing the MyLÚA 'Activity' feed screen with multiple completed cards visible (e.g., breastfeeding tips, emotions during pregnancy, maternal mental health topics). One card titled 'Prenatal yoga and grounding exercises' is visible with a small play icon on the card thumbnail. Background is softly blurred neutral home interior with diffused daylight, calm and clean. The phone is the hero; no hands visible; no dramatic lighting; no glam styling; crisp readable UI.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Phone mockup remains centered and steady against a softly blurred neutral interior background with diffused daylight. Minimal motion only. A single deliberate tap selects the card titled "Prenatal yoga and grounding exercises." The screen transitions to a simple embedded video player view with a paused prenatal yoga frame and a play button overlay. No camera movement, no device rotation, no zoom. Hold on the paused video.
scenes.vo_line_1: LÚA adapts to you—offering small steps.
scenes.vo_line_2: One action at a time, at your pace.

scenes.title: Resource Search (By Zip Code)
scenes.purpose: Show real-world support: find local help conversationally.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred daytime interior with faint greenery visible in background. Natural daylight, clean environment. The screen shows a resource search or chat-to-find-resources flow.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User types: "I need postpartum counseling near 11216." Search results populate vertically with staggered fade-in. No map animation. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_2: Search by zip code and get options that fit your life.

scenes.title: Language Switching (English ↔ Spanish)
scenes.purpose: Reduce language barriers: moms can use Spanish even if others can't.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred warm neutral interior with golden undertones and diffused light. The screen shows a language selector within the app.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User selects Spanish from a dropdown. The UI language switches instantly. User types a short Spanish question. LÚA responds in Spanish. No flashy transitions. Clean UI swap only.
scenes.vo_line_2: So support is clearer—no matter what you speak.
scenes.audio_direction: Clean UI tap; no extra SFX.

scenes.title: Optional Provider Sharing (In Control)
scenes.purpose: Show privacy and control: moms choose what to share with a provider.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against minimal neutral interior background with soft diffused lighting. Professional and calm tone. The screen shows a simple data sharing toggle and plain-language explanation.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User toggles a data sharing switch. The switch slides smoothly from left to right. No sound cues. No glow effects. Still background. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: You stay in control of what's shared.
scenes.vo_line_2: So support feels safe and respectful.

scenes.title: Calendar (Keep Track)
scenes.purpose: Show simple scheduling so important moments don't slip.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred interior with neutral daylight and minimal decor. Clean, organized aesthetic. The screen shows a calendar or appointments UI.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. User taps a date. A small menu appears with subtle fade and slight upward slide. No bounce. No zoom. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: Keep track of what's coming up.
scenes.vo_line_2: So you're not holding it all in your head.

scenes.title: Notifications (Gentle Nudge)
scenes.purpose: Show reminders that feel supportive, not pushy.
scenes.nano_prompt: Vertical 9:16 smartphone mockup centered against softly blurred neutral interior background. Calm and minimal. The screen shows a notification banner style consistent with the mockup set.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. A notification banner slides down from the top edge slowly and smoothly. Text visible: "Visit in 1 hour." The banner fades away gently. No additional motion. No camera movement.
scenes.vo_line_1: Gentle reminders help you stay connected.
scenes.audio_direction: Very soft notification chime (optional) or none.

scenes.title: Emotional Close (Morning Light)
scenes.purpose: Return to the human: calm, steadier, supported—then close with the wordmark.
scenes.nano_prompt: A realistic, documentary-style vertical image (9:16) of a pregnant woman standing near a window in soft morning daylight. She looks calm and settled. Neutral interior. Natural light fills the room. Observational realism composed for mobile viewing. No posing, no glam, natural texture.
scenes.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 frame. Minimal motion only. The woman makes a subtle posture shift as daylight holds steady. No camera movement. Fade to a clean neutral background. The MyLÚA wordmark appears centered via gentle opacity fade. Hold still to end.
scenes.vo_line_2: It should be there—between visits, every day.
scenes.audio_direction: Soft resolve; gentle fade out, no big swell.

project_notes: Imported sample project with 14 scenes. Added missing VO (2 lines per scene) and ensured prompts are self-contained and safety-friendly. Scene 4 is mom↔LÚA conversation. Symptom Log is included as Scene 6. Activity Feed opens prenatal yoga in Scene 8. Provider sharing language used (not doula). Notifications retained as Scene 13 per current scene list.
